title: More Nonsense Limerick 81
content:
There was an old person of Rye,
    Who went up to town on a fly;
    But they said, "If you cough, 
    You are safe to fall off!
    You abstemious old person of Rye!"
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Edward Lear delivers a powerful performance in "More Nonsense Limerick 81"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
